TextENGNew: When Mion called us over, Rena and I rushed to the Sonozaki main house. Passing through the gate, I locked eyes with Ooishi-san in the foyer, who was just about to take off his shoes.
``Oh my, so you two were summoned as well?@k@vS14/11/220700438. Nfu fu fu fu.``
``...You too, Ooishi-san?``

We exchanged a light bow and removed our shoes, then followed Kasai-san's lead down the corridor. The soft creaking of the floorboards beneath our feet only amplified the anxious churning in my chest.
``...Who would have thought I'd set foot in my mortal enemy's stronghold under these circumstances?@k@vS14/11/220700440. Should I be glad I've lived this long, or...?``
Ooishi-san muttered those words quietly to no one in particular, as if reflecting deeply. They seemed to carry emotions far beyond our comprehension, and I found myself unable to respond.
changeReason: Different manner: 'heartily muttered' vs 'muttered quietly' describes different demeanor.

TextENGNew: We were led to the great hall, where the three of us took seats near the entrance. The town council's most distinguished members were already assembled, forming a circle around the room.
At the head of the room sat Mion, serving as acting family head, alongside her mother Akane-san. ...Surprisingly, the family head herself, Granny Oryou, was nowhere to be seen.
``--With this, everyone is present.@k@vS14/03/220300145. ...Let us begin.``

Mion glanced briefly at Rena and me as she spoke, then straightened her expression and surveyed the room. The atmosphere was so taut and solemn that for a moment, it seemed as though everyone in the room had stopped breathing.
``...You've all heard the situation by now.@k@vS14/16/222200115. The clinic has been attacked.@k@vS14/16/222200116. At least five people, including Dr. Irie, are being held there under armed guard.``
Akane-san's composed voice resonated through the hushed great hall.
Everyone sat in uniform silence, their eyes fixed on Akane-san at the head of the room and Mion beside her. They hung on every word and watched every gesture.

``The Okinomiya police have the area surrounded, but... our opponents are essentially paramilitary.@k@vS14/16/222200118. Freeing the hostages won't be easy.@k@vS14/16/222200119. A reckless assault would only produce casualties, so for now a standoff is the best we can manage.``
``Na ha ha... how embarrassing.@k@vS14/11/220700442. We were a step too slow in rushing to the scene.``

Ooishi-san scratched his head with a strained smile beside me. ...But his eyes weren't smiling. The fury threatening to erupt was barely contained, and it was painfully obvious he wanted to bolt from this room and arrest the criminals himself.
``......Acting head.``
``--I'll get straight to the point.@k@vS14/03/220300147. I will accept questions, but please bear in mind that time is of the essence.``
At Akane-san's prompting, Mion gave a silent nod, slowly surveyed the room, and spoke in a grave tone.
``This is the criminals' statement.``
``'For starters, we have taken one of the hostages, Houjou Satoko, into our custody.'``
``'If you wish to see her released, bring the Furude family head, Furude Rika, along with Tomitake Jirou's belongings, to the Furude Shrine by five o'clock today.'``
``This message was relayed through the captive Director Irie.``
``R-Rika-chama...?``
``Tomitake-san's belongings...? What's that about?``
``What lawless scoundrels...!``

``If the deadline of five o'clock is not met...@k@vS14/03/220300153. I trust no further explanation is necessary.@k@vS14/03/220300154. The criminal group claims it will release the clinic hostages simultaneously with Houjou Satoko.``
``As if we can trust a promise made by the likes of them!!``
``Send the police in!!@k@vS14/00/eldB11003. Rescue the people at the clinic first!!``
``Yes, yes!! Do it!!``
Spewing curses and cries of outrage, the elders pressed forward toward Mion and Akane-san, led by Mayor Kimiyoshi.
Akane-san let the commotion wash over her without reacting, then turned to face Ooishi-san at the entrance.

``What's the police's assessment?@k@vS14/16/222200122. Storming the clinic means facing an armed group -- they've almost certainly anticipated that possibility and prepared accordingly.@k@vS14/16/222200123. I don't think the precinct's manpower alone can handle this.``
changeReason: New translation adds location detail not in original: 'clinic'.

TextENGNew: ``...You're absolutely right.@k@vS14/11/220700444. Without requesting riot police deployment from prefectural headquarters, we won't stand a chance.``
changeReason: Different locations referenced: old mentions 'prefectural police', new mentions 'prefectural headquarters'.

TextENGNew: ``That can be left to Saburou-san.``

``That's a great help.@k@vS14/11/220700446. Ideally, we want everyone out alive -- that's our highest priority.@k@vS14/11/220700447. ...But honestly, it's going to come down to how things unfold in the moment.``
``...Damn it!@k@vS14/01/220100200. After everything we've done, it still comes down to a gamble...?!``
I drove my fist into the tatami. We had been too cautious, and now we'd been outmaneuvered. If only we'd moved everyone to the Sonozaki estate sooner...!!
``There's no point dwelling on regrets now, Keiichi-kun.``
Rena gently placed her hand on mine. When I looked up, she met my gaze with her lips pressed into a firm line, slowly shaking her head.
``Satoko-chan needed to be properly invited here, so you were planning to ask everyone about it right here today, weren't you?``

``We failed to anticipate that our enemy would act so quickly.@k@vS14/02/220200073. That was our mistake.@k@vS14/02/220200074. But before you get angry about it, we need to discuss what we're going to do from here.``
``...Yeah, you're right.@k@vS14/01/220100202. You're absolutely right.``
Rena's words calmed the surge of emotion just enough. ...She couldn't possibly be calm either, though. The hand touching mine was slick with sweat and trembling faintly.
``More importantly, why isn't Shii-chan here?@k@vS14/02/220200076. Has she not been released yet?``
``The National Police Agency helped me keep her from being taken by prefectural police HQ... but that had an unfortunate side effect.``
``It won't be easy to set her free. And even if we do, prefectural HQ will make every effort to apprehend her.``
``We had a hard time keeping her from going on a rampage, but we managed to give her some sedatives, so she's calm now.``
...It was all too easy to imagine.
If Shion heard Satoko was abducted, she'd most surely think she needed to rush here at any cost. She must've had a huge brawl with the detective in charge of her interrogation.
``But, is that really okay?@k@vS14/01/220100204. Ooishi-san, if you're here then Shion is...``
``Ah, no need to worry on that front.@k@vS14/11/220700451. She's currently sleeping in the interrogation room and Kuma-chan is keeping an eye on her.``

``Also, I did bring the data and the negatives here, but the copies are still being analyzed by Akasaka-san and the old man from forensics.@k@vS14/11/220700453. I'm confident that won't be a problem.``
``...Then isn't it completely meaningless to hand over those materials now?``
Rena was exactly right.

According to Ooishi, the materials were already handed over to the Metropolitan Police Department. And the alleged mastermind behind the bulk of this plot at the ``Tokyo`` organization has apparently already agreed to a plea deal.
Even if the data were recovered, it wouldn't change a thing.
``I'm sure they don't know the material has already been passed on to the folks at Public Security.@k@vS14/11/220700455. Also, the deal with ``Tokyo`` HQ has already been finalized.``
``So our enemies have a problem, too...``
But that doesn't mean this is a favorable situation to be in.
Additionally, if our enemies learn the truth, they'll start acting in desperation and do something serious. For now, let's pray they don't hear what's happening at Public Security.

``...It seems that Rika Furude isn't among the hostages in the clinic.@k@vS14/11/220700457. And they must not realize that yet.@k@vS14/11/220700458. Otherwise, there'd be no reason to mention her in the exchange terms.``
``But for now, it's too dangerous to let them know.@k@vS14/11/220700460. I'll rush into the clinic with the riot police as soon as they arrive to rescue the hostages and Rika Furude.``
``What happens after they're secured?@k@vS14/18/223300002. Are you going to shamelessly bring Rika-chama to the shrine and hand her over?@k@vS14/18/223300003. There's no way we can accept that.``

``The criminals are currently stationed in the clinic and surrounded by the police at the moment, right?@k@vS14/00/makino11002. Then it would be best to wait it out overnight and gather our forces, then rush in when we find a good opening.``
``The more hastily we act, the less likely we are to succeed.``
The elders sitting near Mayor Kimiyoshi and Makino-san nodded at their words. When I saw that, I stood up and shouted.
``Hold it!@k@vS14/01/220100207. They'll kill Satoko if we do that!@k@vS14/01/220100208. Do you all want Satoko murdered?!``

``Keiichi-kun, use common sense and think it through.@k@vS14/16/222200127. What happens if they try invading during the daytime and the operation fails?@k@vS14/16/222200128. If anything happens to Lady Rika, it's all over.``
Akane-san struck me with that declaration. When she confronted me with reality and pressed me for an answer, I struggled to find the words.
``And even if we were to hand over Lady Rika, what guarantee is there they'd honor the deal?``

``None, of course.@k@vS14/16/222200131. So even if we delivered Lady Rika to the shrine, it's unlikely that would save Lady Satoko.@k@vS14/16/222200132. And that would just result in two corpses, wouldn't it?``
``Plus, the Furude family head is far more important to this village than you may realize. She's essential.@k@vS14/16/222200134. You can't expect us to simply exchange that for one life.``
``Why should we have to take a bet that's not worth the risk?``
``Like I'm telling you!@k@vS14/01/220100211. We can carry out a rescue operation if we combine everyone's power!@k@vS14/01/220100212. The Sonozakis have the power to do it, don't they?``
``...For a member of the Houjou family?@k@vS14/16/222200137. Hah, don't be absurd.``
``The Houjou family betrayed Hinamizawa.@k@vS14/16/222200139. Even if she's a child, what obligation do we have to put our precious soldiers in danger for the sake of one of them?``
``Th-that has nothing to do with Satoko-chan!!``
Her cold manner of speaking was horrifying.
``A-Akane-chan...@k@vS14/18/223300005. that's going a little too far...``
Mayor Kimiyoshi cut in, apparently unable to keep silent while watching that. Then, he slowly spoke as if to comfort me and Rena.

``Didn't you say just a little while ago?@k@vS14/18/223300007. A significant number of people will be necessary to rescue the hostages from the clinic.@k@vS14/18/223300008. But given the situation, dividing our forces is unavoidable if personnel are being sent to help Satoko-chan.``
``...And this is obviously a provocation.@k@vS14/18/223300010. If we allow the criminals to manipulate us we'll end up taking big damage, just as Akane-san pointed out, right?``
``That's no different from abandoning Satoko to death!!``
``Calm yourself, Keiichi-kun.@k@vS14/16/222200141. If you insist on shouting like this, I'll ask you to leave.``
That terrifying glare... made me lock up, unable to move.
But I can't afford to back down now. I put all my strength into my quivering fists, then stared straight back at her.
``...Satoko is our friend.@k@vS14/01/220100216. Of course, that goes for Rika-chan too.@k@vS14/01/220100217. You may be acting on your own priorities, but they're both equally precious to me!``
...I realize perfectly well that the situation is dangerous and that I'm saying something unreasonable!
But if there's even the smallest chance, why wouldn't you do everything you can to pursue it?! Stand together and oppose your enemies as one. Isn't that the Hinamizawa way!?!
``...I'll say it again.@k@vS14/16/222200143. The Houjou family betrayed Hinamizawa.@k@vS14/16/222200144. Why should the people here put their lives on the line for one of their children?``
``That's a thing of the past! It has nothing to do with Satoko!!@k@vS14/01/220100222. You're all selfishly looking at Satoko as if she's your enemy!!``
``How can you treat a small child so coldly and abandon her, and still call yourselves humaaaaaan!?!``
``Keiichi-kun, calm down!``
``...Ma'am, so you're telling us you won't help us rescue Satoko-chan, aren't you?``
``Of course.@k@vS14/16/222200146. Our priorities are steadfast.``

``First comes rescuing the Furude family head from the clinic. Then comes the remaining hostages at the clinic.@k@vS14/16/222200148. And we already know the precise room where Lady Rika is located, don't we?``
``The rescue of Lady Satoko is something only to be considered after those two tasks are complete.``
``N-no way...!@k@vS14/02/220200082. Then we'll be too late... Far too late!!``

``That's enough!@k@vS14/01/220100225. I was an idiot to think you'd listen to us!!@k@vS14/01/220100226. If there's nothing you can do to help us, then we'll just have to save them on our own!!@k@vS14/01/220100227. Both Satoko and Rika-chan!!``
I turned my back as I said that and was about to fly out of the room. But just then,
``......I don't need rescuing...``
``R-Rika-chan?!``
````Rika-chama?!````
Everyone was shocked when they turned toward the entrance. There stood Rika-chan, who was supposedly stranded at the clinic.
``A-are you all right?@k@vS14/01/220100230. Rika-chan?!``
``You're all covered in mud...@k@vS14/02/220200084. How did you get here?!``

Rena and I were both completely astonished by her appearance, and instinctively rushed over to her. Rika-chan's dress was caked in mud up to her chest, her hair was a mess, and her face looked pitch black.
She was wheezing and her breathing looked painful. She must've run the whole way here in an all-out sprint.
``Meep... I'm not hurt.@k@vS14/05/220500242. I got all dirty because I ran through a rice paddy to get here.@k@vS14/05/220500243. ...I'm sorry for making a mess of the rice...``
``Ohh, Rika-chama...@k@vS14/00/eldA11006. I'm glad you're safe...!``
``Thank goodness... At least Rika-chama is unharmed...!``
The elders all surrounded Rika-chan at once and rejoiced at her safety.
However, Rika-chan broke out of their circle and walked up to the head seat in front of Mion and Akane-san, leaving a trail of muddy footprints on the floor.
``Well done escaping from the clinic...@k@vS14/16/222200151. Did you not have any pursuers?``
``It seems like they didn't notice me.@k@vS14/05/220500245. As soon as the Mountain Dogs left the room, there was nobody there so I was able to escape through the window.``
Saying ``more importantly,`` Rika-chan knelt down on the spot and bowed down.
``I'm begging you.@k@vS14/05/220500247. Please... please lend the aid of the Sonozaki family to save Satoko...``
``...Rika-chan...!``

``Satoko was kidnapped right before my eyes.@k@vS14/05/220500249. She willingly gave herself to the Mountain Dogs in order to keep them from finding me.@k@vS14/05/220500250. Satoko is the only reason I was able to get out of there...!``
``...What about the others?``
``They're still inside the clinic.@k@vS14/05/220500252. I think they're being held in another room somewhere.``
``I realize that I have no right to ask this since I ran away on my own.@k@vS14/05/220500254. But... please, I'm begging you.@k@vS14/05/220500255. Please... rescue Satoko...!``
``Rika-chan...``
Everyone was watching with bated breath.
Then, the moment Mion motioned like she was going to say something, Akane-san leaned forward to stop her and then spoke up with an expressionless look on her face.
``...Is that an official decree as the Furude family head?@k@vS14/16/222200153. Lady Rika?``

``...This has nothing to do with the family head, or Oyashiro-sama, or anything like that.@k@vS14/05/220500257. Satoko is my friend.@k@vS14/05/220500258. She's my precious friend.@k@vS14/05/220500259. So is it wrong for me to ask you to help her?``
``That's a perfectly valid thing for a human to say.@k@vS14/16/222200155. ...However, you're more than just that.``

``You're the head of the Furude family and the reincarnation of the guardian god of Hinamizawa. Your words can blow away the lives of two thousand villagers.@k@vS14/16/222200157. Can you really say that with that knowledge in mind?``
``Your sentiment is admirable.@k@vS14/16/222200159. If this were a classroom exercise, your teacher would praise you and give you full marks for expressing your genial desire to help your friends.``

``...However, reality is not so sweet and gentle.@k@vS14/16/222200161. There are those who'd be swayed by your thoughts, put their lives on the line, and even lose them if fortune isn't on their side.``
``If ten people die trying to save this one person, how do you intend to make things right for them and their families?``
``...If that's the case, then we'll...!``
``Aah, very well.@k@vS14/16/222200164. If you're about to say you'll help her on your own, no one will stop you.@k@vS14/16/222200165. You can give it your all and then die at your own discretion.``
``...But, the end result is the same.@k@vS14/16/222200167. You're not even considering the family members and close friends who will end up left behind.``
``To be perfectly honest, your thoughts are purely focused on self-complacency.``
``You don't want to be inhumane. You don't want to carry the scars of abandoning a friend.@k@vS14/16/222200170. Why do we need to put our lives on the line for your own selfish whims?``
``A-Akane-chan...!``
``I don't care if you call me a cold-hearted person or a villain.@k@vS14/16/222200172. Even if you hate me and want to kill me, I'll allow you to feel that way.``
``But I'm at least prepared for that.@k@vS14/16/222200174. Regardless of what you think, we have a responsibility to look after the people we leave behind.``
``All of the elders here feel the same way.@k@vS14/16/222200176. ...But what about all of you?@k@vS14/16/222200177. Do you have the resolution to represent them? Or can you only tear things down?``
``Without that, your words amount to nothing more than ramblings of a naive chiiild!!``
...I immediately froze in place.

My intense rage and strong feelings bordering on bloodlust instantly shattered in the wake of Akane-san's roar. Even Mayor Kimiyoshi, who had been trying to mediate earlier, was completely at a loss for words.
Resolution. Responsibility. I was so overwhelmed by her firm will, which I no longer considered coldhearted, that I couldn't even maintain my posture.
Rena and Rika-chan both seemed to be drowning in depression, their bodies trembling with helplessness and regret.
I want to save Satoko. I'm her friend, and a human being... so it's perfectly natural to feel that way.
But what about our duty and responsibility to the victims?
And their friends and families...?
If you simply charge in running on heroic spirit, without strong resolution and the ability to take responsibility, then you really are acting on a selfish whim just as Akane-san said.
But then... do we have to abandon Satoko?
Deep in my heart, I was screaming, ``That's not right.``
I told Rika-chan once before, Satoko is a precious friend and she's indispensable for my happiness. I'll never accept any happiness gained at her expense.
In which case... what the hell can I do...?
Shit... why am I feeling discouraged now...?!
``...Mom.@k@vS14/03/220300156. No, everyone here.``
Just then.
Mion had been silently listening to our exchange without showing any emotion, but she finally opened her mouth.

``As acting head of the Sonozaki family, I have a proposal for everyone.@k@vS14/03/220300158. ...That we fight against the Mountain Dogs, and their leader Miyo Takano.@k@vS14/03/220300159. Together as a village.@k@vS14/03/220300160. With our lives on the line.``
``Mii-chan...?``

``Weren't you listening?@k@vS14/16/222200180. Your adversary is fully prepared. If you fight to no avail, people won't just get hurt. They'll die!@k@vS14/16/222200181. And yet you still wish to risk the lives of the villagers, acting head Mion Sonozaki?!``
``...Yes.@k@vS14/03/220300162. Because... this is Hinamizawa.``
Mion stared straight back at Akane-san with no fear of retaliation, and continued.

``If they throw stones at one of us, then two should throw back.@k@vS14/03/220300164. If they throw stones at two of us, then throw back with four.@k@vS14/03/220300165. If they chase eight of you with sticks, drive them off with sixteen.``

``If there are a thousand enemies, then the whole village should stand and face them.@k@vS14/03/220300167. Any indignity felt by one of us is felt by all of us.@k@vS14/03/220300168. We all stand united for the sake of one of our own.``
``...I believe that was this village's creed, since even before the dam opposition movement.``

``Is saving lives about calculating numbers of the living and the dead?@k@vS14/03/220300171. Is it as clear cut as sacrificing one person because they're beyond help?@k@vS14/03/220300172. Our enemies are powerful, and damage is unavoidable even if we work together.``

``Then are you going to run away from this reality?@k@vS14/03/220300174. What we should be discussing right now is not a choice between fighting or keeping quiet. We should be discussing what we can do to win!``
``That's what this time, this meeting is for!@k@vS14/03/220300176. Do you believe that peace will come if we don't drive away our enemies?!``
I could feel the inspiring power of Mion's words throughout my whole body. Yes... that's right. That's the root of the voice that's been crying out inside my heart.
If we don't fight, then nothing will even begin. Even though there's an enemy right in front of us intent on doing us harm, we're thinking about what we can do to escape?!
It's certainly true that I wasn't prepared.
Strong duty and conviction are necessary to overcome defeat in this battle!

But it doesn't mean all you have to do is blindly struggle against them. You have to understand that everyone else's fate is in your hands too, not just your own. Applying all of your wisdom, you need to have the convictions to fight.
It was the same for Rena and Rika-chan. Everyone raised their heads all at once to display their passionate thoughts to everyone else around.
``I've heard all kinds of stories of valor during the dam war from Mion and Shion.@k@vS14/01/180101342. But that unity wasn't some veneer that only developed five years ago during the dam war.``
``It's a passionate tradition 40 years old that was born to overcome the painful times after the end of the war!!``

``That's why I think the people who've grown up since then are amazing! I have deep respect for them!@k@vS14/01/180101348. The Hinamizawa we have today only exists because those men fought for it!@k@vS14/01/180101351. And that's the sort of Hinamizawa I want to feel proud to live in!!``
``...Th-that's right!``
``Our enemies are shrewd and unforgiving!@k@vS14/02/220200088. They won't settle for Satoko-chan! Next time they'll try bartering someone else's life!``
``If we don't stand up to them, there will be more and more victims!!``

``...The people targeting my life are plotting a huge conspiracy involving the entire village.@k@vS14/05/220500263. It's true that our enemies are formidable...@k@vS14/05/220500264. but they're not invincible.``

``The people here have a strong bond that can penetrate even iron, and stronger beliefs than our enemies!@k@vS14/05/220500266. We need to once again demonstrate the strength of the Guardians, who were able to withstand even the power over the government!!``
Little by little, I began to hear the elders voicing their agreement. In response to that, Mion turned her body toward Akane-san and looked straight at her.

``Mom... Or rather, Akane Sonozaki.@k@vS14/03/220300178. This is an order from the Sonozaki family head.@k@vS14/03/220300179. Satoko Houjou is a member of Hinamizawa. Please lend your strength to help her.``
``I'll take complete responsibility for the lives of you, your subordinates, and their families.@k@vS14/03/220300181. Deploy our troops, for the sake of protecting Satoko Houjou and Rika Furude...``
``...Do not speak as if you're a full-grown adult, you chiiiild!!!``

Akane-san vigorously rose to her feet and grabbed the katana sitting on the floor beside her, then loosed the sword from its sheath in a single continuous motion, and keenly swung it down toward Mion's neck!
``Mii-chan?!``
That moment.
Almost everyone was frozen in shock and left trembling. They may have even stopped breathing.
And in that moment.
The tip of the sword stopped right before the base of Mion's neck, and Akane-san arrogantly looked down the blade at Mion.
Mion hardened her body and slightly arched her back, but her eyes didn't waver at all. They continued intently glaring back, like a sharp blade of her own.

``You understand, right, acting family head?@k@vS14/16/222200184. When you say you're willing to ``take responsibility for their lives`` that means you should have the resolve to lose your head right here and now!``
``For someone who has always hidden in Oryou's shadow, are you truly prepared to say that?!``
Akane-san's sharp voice felt like it was squeezing at my heart.
...Even from all the way over here, my whole body froze and began to shiver. My field of vision absentmindedly narrowed.
I couldn't imagine how Mion must feel, sitting right next to the blade.
Nevertheless.
With her mother's demonic visage reflected in her resolute, wide-open eyes, Mion continued her declaration.
``...I am...@k@vS14/03/220300183. prepared... Fully prepared...!!``
``Who is going to believe that if you can only say it at a time like this?!``

``You've been thinking the duty of the next head is to make someone else take responsibility and to irresponsibly succeed to the position!@k@vS14/16/222200188. Do you think you can truly understand the pain and suffering of putting your life on the liiine?!``
``Then take a good look!@k@vS14/03/220300185. Witness the resolve of the next head of the family, Mion Sonozakiiii!!``
Mion tightly squeezed the katana and held it to her throat, even though fresh blood began spilling out as the blade dug into her hands.
Then, she took a deep, vigorous breath and forcefully pulled the blade down!!
``Mion, stoooop!!``
``Mii-chan!!``
Blood splattered out.
Several vermillion puddles formed on the floor, dying the tatami in deep red.
Mion had grabbed the blade of the sword and pulled it down on herself.
But Akane-san grabbed the blade with her other hand and stopped it, leaving only a slight cut on Mion's throat.
``...You utter fool...!@k@vS14/16/222200190. If you wish to go this far with your lunacy, you're beyond saving...!!``
Akane grimaced in pain, as she too grabbed the blade with her bare hand. Beads of sweat trickled down her forehead, but she still forced a smile.
Mion stared stunned for a while, but the moment she realized it wasn't just her own blood flowing down the blade, she released her grip on the sword.
``It's just a scratch...@k@vS14/16/222200192. I'm fine...!``
``A-Akane-chan!@k@vS14/18/223300016. I can't believe you would be so reckless...!``
``Someone, stop the bleeding!@k@vS14/00/makino11006. And call a doctor...!``
``Didn't you hear? The doctor is in enemy hands.@k@vS14/16/222200194. Honestly... are you all so rattled just seeing a little blood?@k@vS14/16/222200195. Try to calm down a little...``
Akane-san shook her bloody hand, as if to mock the panicking elders.
My consciousness felt like it was slowly fading away every time a drop of blood fell to the floor, but when I realized that Mion's left hand was bleeding just as heavily, I ran up to her.
``M-Mion!@k@vS14/01/220100246. Are you all right?!``
``Y-yeah... O-ow ow...!``
Mion playfully smiled, but the wounds of grabbing a sword with her bare hands were firmly carved into her fingers and her palm, staining them deep red with blood.
Rena quickly rushed out of the room, then brought in a first aid kit and a bucket of water. She pulled out some disinfectant and cotton gauze in a smooth, well-practiced gesture.
Then, she tightly tied a towel around Mion's wrist, rinsed the blood away with some water, and tightly taped some disinfectant-soaked gauze around the wound.
``Mii-chan!@k@vS14/02/220200093. Hold your hand out, like this!@k@vS14/02/220200094. Rika-chan, grind this stuff down!!``
``Roger!``
``Owowow!@k@vS14/03/220300191. Th-that stings!@k@vS14/03/220300192. Rena, you could be a little more gentle...!``
``No, I can't!@k@vS14/02/220200096. Consider this your punishment for doing something so reckless!!``
Rena sniffled with tears in her eyes as she replaced the piece of cotton that had been dyed red in a flash.
Then, Rika-chan handed her the leaves she'd ground up, probably some kind of water pennywort to stop bleeding, and then Rena rubbed them into the wound.
Mion couldn't help but cry out, but Rena paid it no heed and continued. Akane-san was receiving similar treatment from the elders.
``You moron...!@k@vS14/01/220100248. Who told you to go that far?!``
``Ah, ahahaha...@k@vS14/03/220300195. I slipped up and got caught up in the heat of the moment...``
``Slipped up?@k@vS14/01/220100250. You're telling me all this bloodshed was from just getting a little carried away?!``
My emotions suddenly flared up and I raised my voice. Mion could've been seriously hurt if Akane-san hadn't held back.
No matter how much she says she's prepared, she's still a tactless moron quick to do something dangerous...!
``...Sorry, Kei-chan.@k@vS14/03/220300197. That goes for you too, Rena, Rika-chan.@k@vS14/03/220300198. ...You know me, I'm an idiot.``
``Seriously.@k@vS14/01/220100252. ...How could you do something so reckless...?!``
``I'm sorry, Kei-chan.@k@vS14/03/220300200. I... decided that I would believe in you.``
Mion looked straight at me and bitterly smiled with a remorseful look on her face.

``No matter what the future may hold, I've decided I'm going to believe in you.@k@vS14/03/220300202. So, I wanted others to believe in you, too.@k@vS14/03/220300203. You're... the man who really understands and respects my willingness to put my life on the line.``
``And you dare to risk your life for the sake of the things I hold dear.@k@vS14/03/220300205. I want everyone here to believe that...``

``Let's... rescue Satoko.@k@vS14/03/220300207. You and I, Kei-chan. Plus Rena and Rika-chan. With the four of us together, I'm sure we'll manage.@k@vS14/03/220300208. No, if you count Shion who's fighting the police right now, that makes five of us.``
``We can do it, because we're the strongest club in the world!!``
Mion's words moved me to tears.
And.
We all decided right here. We were fully prepared.
...Right. Of course!!
Mion, I swear I'll make the most of that feeling!! I'll definitely live up to your expectations!!
Who cares about the Mountain Dogs, or Takano, or Tokyo?! We'll let everyone know that there's nobody in the solar system, or even the galaxy who can defeat us!!
``That's right, Keiichi-kun!!@k@vS14/02/220200098. Now that things have come to this, Rena won't show them any mercy either!!``

``I'll never be afraid of an enemy that can't even put up a fight without taking Satoko-chan hostage!@k@vS14/02/220200100. We'll deliver their punishment together, and make them continue to regret their mistakes long after death!!!``
``Right, Rika-chan?!``
``Y-yeah... That's right...!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1191. Anyone saying the chance of victory is uncertain is an outright liar!``

``Our desire to win... Our strength and determination to protect what we hold dear will allow us to carve through fate!!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1193. So, I'm certain of it. We absolutely will win this!!``

``I can't abandon myself to despair, thinking ``I don't care because this is my last chance!!``@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1195. We'll grab hold of our time and our happiness, using our own strength and will!!!``
Right there.
``...Hold on now. Who said you could do this on your own?!``
As the four of us stood united, a voice called out to us like a spear stabbing into us from the side.
Looking back, Akane-san and the elders all around her were sitting with fearless looks on their faces, and the shining light of strong will and determination in their eyes.
``Sonozaki family head, we'll join you in the fight!@k@vS14/00/eldA11009. Let's show them the terrifying strength of Hinamizawa united!!``
``This has nothing to do with the Houjous!@k@vS14/00/eldB11009. Anyone who does harm to one of our citizens is an enemy of the village!``
``We entrust our lives to you!@k@vS14/00/eldC11006. Let's face this together!!``
The elders were getting fired up and cheering us on. Akane-san raised her bandage-wrapped hand to interject, then grinned back at us.
``Go tell the boss.@k@vS14/16/222200199. The entire Sonozaki Group is going to carry out a raid, at once.``
``Then, evacuate the villagers and call in our battle-ready members.@k@vS14/16/222200201. Our foes are an armed group. Don't let them lay a finger on anyone in the village!``
``This will be a once-in-a-lifetime gamble to drive out an army of outsiders! Smash them so hard not even a speck of dust is left behiiiiind!!``
``...Understood!!``
````Yeeeeeaaaaahhh!!!````
The air was shattered as everyone let out a roar all at once. It was enough force to reach the heavens.
``...Excuse me~, everyone.@k@vS14/11/220700462. Perhaps you've forgotten about me?@k@vS14/11/220700463. Do you expect me to sit back and keep silent while you organize a raid?``
``Don't worry, we'll allow you to arrest some of them.@k@vS14/16/222200204. If you'd like, you're free to consider this a sedition crime and put me in jail.``
``Nfu fu fu!@k@vS14/11/220700465. Please, stop joking around. No prison would welcome delicate human nitroglycerin like yourself, you know~?!``
Ooishi-san's belly shook as he let out a joyful laugh, then he stood up and walked toward the hallway. He slapped both his cheeks to psych himself up, then turned back this way.

``...As a member of the police, I'll do everything in my power to get the hostages at the clinic released.@k@vS14/11/220700467. And to analyze the materials left behind by Mr. Tomitake.@k@vS14/11/220700468. ...When that's all done, I'll try to gather as many people as I can to help.``
``Come to me if your retirement pay gets axed!@k@vS14/16/222200206. I'll do what I can to make up the difference... Heh heh heh!``
``Quit joking around.@k@vS14/11/220700470. The Japanese police force is done for if we start accepting money from gangsters.@k@vS14/11/220700471. ...Na ha ha ha!``
Then, Ooishi-san headed toward the entrance. We all silently looked at one another and nodded.
Satoko... wait for us. We'll save you, I promise.
``...Mom.@k@vS14/16/222200208. Is this really all right?``

``Gaa ha ha ha!@k@vS14/17/222300002. You're an idiot, but Mion is an even bigger idiot, isn't she~?!@k@vS14/17/222300003. I figured it would turn into a bloodbath if I had stepped in, so I had to stay out of it~!``

``Aahahaha!@k@vS14/16/222200210. Just looking at that girl's spirit really got my blood flowing!@k@vS14/16/222200211. ...Yeah, I believe you were right not to make an appearance, Mom.@k@vS14/16/222200212. There's no way you could've stopped just short of striking distance with those arms of yours.``

``Preposterous!@k@vS14/17/222300005. Despite how I may look, I could have dealt out some jigen-ryu style paper-cutting swordsmanship. I'm not one to be outdone by youngsters!@k@vS14/17/222300006. I'd have shown everyone an even flashier battle of swords than you did!``

``...Jigen-ryu style? Isn't that the one that swings the sword toward the ground from directly above, with enough force it doesn't require a second swing?@k@vS14/16/222200214. There's no way you could stop just short of striking distance that way.@k@vS14/16/222200215. Are you sure you're not thinking of karatake-wari?``
``...And with that, the load on our shoulders has finally lightened.``

``Indeed.@k@vS14/17/222300008. ...I didn't think that girl could've been saved until after my death... I'm truly glad to see it.@k@vS14/17/222300009. And as for Mion, she's grown into a splendid leader.``
``After all... a woman can change for the man she loves.@k@vS14/16/222200218. It was the same way for me.``
``...I still haven't accepted him yet.``
In another room of the Sonozaki house, after all of us had enthusiastically exited.
We, of course, had no idea they were having such an exchange.
